tip: Always get 3 vendor quotes. Comparing quotes helps you negotiate better rates. Most Indian event vendors expect negotiation - a 15-20% discount is standard if you ask.

tip: Start your government tender search on GeM (gem.gov.in). Most state and central government event requirements are listed here. Register as a vendor - it's free and opens doors to lakhs of tenders annually.

tip: Always visit a venue before booking. Photos can be misleading. Check ceiling height, power supply capacity, parking, and loading dock access. These small details can make or break your event logistics.
